column1: # Monte Carlo Simulation - GeoStudio SLOPE/W + SEEP/W
# Execution   : Sequential (chained SEEP/W -> SLOPE/W per iteration)
# SC (Silty Clay): c_mean=198.4 psf  COV=35% | phi_mean=20.0 deg  COV=10%
# AWYC (Weathered Yazoo Clay in Active Zone): c_mean=79.3 psf  COV=40% | phi_mean=19.0 deg  COV=12%
# WYC (Weathered Yazoo Clay): c_mean=248.5 psf  COV=40% | phi_mean=19.0 deg  COV=12%
# UYC (Unweathered Yazoo Clay): c_mean=384.2 psf  COV=30% | phi_mean=20.0 deg  COV=8%
# cohesion = psf | phi = degrees | rainfall = in/day | FS = dimensionless
